title: Active Management and Performance Measurement: A fund manager's portfolio has an alpha of 2%, a...
summary: Evaluate the Treynor measure for portfolio performance assessment.
prompt: A fund manager's portfolio has an alpha of 2%, a beta of 0.8, and a standard deviation of 15%. If the risk-free rate is 3%, what is the Treynor measure?
solution: Treynor Measure = (Portfolio Return - Risk-Free Rate) / Beta = (5% - 3%) / 0.8 = 2.5%.
